name: premiere-pro-audio-separator
description: Professional Adobe Premiere Pro plugin to separate audio tracks into stems (vocals, instrumental, drums, bass) using AI-powered Demucs technology

scripts.build: echo 'No build step required for CEP extension'
scripts.lint: node --check client/app.js && node --check client/translations.js && node --check scripts/audioseparator-package-macos-pkg.mjs && node --check scripts/audioseparator-package-windows-exe.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run build
scripts.package: echo 'Use package:macos-pkg or package:windows-exe for unified installers'

author: Cyril V
